programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A womanizing owner will lose his run-down Caribbean bar, and his wife, if he can't change his toxic behavior.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: The eccentric owner of Brix Wine Bar is too busy being the life of the party to notice his business is withering on the vine.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: The obnoxious behavior of two feuding brothers threatens to put an end to the storied legacy of Royal Oaks, the oldest bar and barbecue joint in Youngstown, Ohio.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: After giving their artsy, irresponsible landlord a share of the bar, the brothers behind Martini Brothers Burger Bar are at their wits' end and ready to call Jon for help.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Former Judas Priest frontman Tim Ripper Owens calls in Jon after discovering being a rock star and running a rock club are two very different skills.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon visits The Hooch, an X-rated bar where the foul-mouthed owner wastes her husband's money and constantly berates her female staff.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: At an Ann Arbor, MI, college alumni bar, Jon is forced to deal with a hotheaded owner whose fiery temper keeps his staff on edge and his million-dollar debt on ice.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A former psychologist turned bar owner attempts to run a Detroit jazz club, but her interfering family and lazy staff have her seeking counseling from Jon.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: In a Bar Rescue first, Jon helps a failing strip club saddled with a disinterested staff, a skeevy vibe, and an off-putting name: Chix on Dix.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: The feud between the owners of Mac & Chester's SRO has led to a bifurcation of their business and attracted a dysfunctional, rowdy clientele.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: The owner of The Gallopin' Goose ruined his marriage and his bar's reputation when he had an illicit affair that resulted in a child.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator 285: Henderson vs. Queally was a mixed martial arts event produced by Bellator MMA, that took place on 23 September 2022 at the 3Arena in Dublin, Ireland.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator 286: Pitbull vs. Borics was a mixed martial arts event produced by Bellator MMA that took place on October 1, 2022, at the Long Beach Arena in Long Beach, California, United States.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator 287: Piccolotti vs. Barnaoui (also known as Bellator Milan) was a mixed martial arts event produced by Bellator MMA, that took place on October 29, 2022, at the Allianz Cloud Arena in Milan, Italy.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator 288: Nemkov vs. Anderson 2 was a mixed martial arts event produced by Bellator MMA that took place on November 18, 2022, at the Wintrust Arena in Chicago, Illinois, United States.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator 289: Stots vs. Sabatello was a mixed martial arts event produced by Bellator MMA that took place on December 9, 2022, at the Mohegan Sun Arena in Uncasville, Connecticut, United States.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Divorced parents Christina and Jim along with daughter Tara, 21, discuss that dad's new wife is the same age as Tara, how it's ok Tara is a webcam model to help pay bills, and that all this is making Tara a raging, angry monster with low self-esteem.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Police called it one of worst crimes ever. A boy held captive under the stairs. Jordan Bleimeyer, 5, was starved and abused. His stepmother, Tammi Bleimeyer, now behind bars, denied hurting Jordan but her children reveal how they saved Jordan's life.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Trisha launched a YouTube channel, "Truthfully Trisha". She says she deals with her family's disapproval and also her online "haters". Husband, Sean, says he's fed up with his wife's streaming. Can Dr. Phil help Trisha disconnect to focus on family? Pt. 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil investigates a popular new website that dishes the dirt on non-celebrities. On creator Nik Richie's controversial site, TheDirty.com, people anonymously submit photos & negative comments about anyone in their community, tabloid style.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Amanda, 25, says she was molested over 795 times by her father, Earl Nix, a secret when revealed to family was rejected despite Nix being convicted of first-degree criminal sexual conduct. The family comes face-to-face in an emotional attempt for truth.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Cassie is stressed raising 4 children--Brinley, 15, smokes pot, vapes, and runs away, once claiming kidnapping. Cassie's husband, Jonah, with his drug & alcohol abuse, is a danger to her children. Dr. Phil enlists Brinley's help to enlighten the family.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Jodi Arias killed her ex-boyfriend Travis Alexander in 2008. He was stabbed more than 24 times, had his throat slit & was shot in the head. Behind-the-scenes trial details from prosecutor Juan Martinez & a juror & Travis's sister Tanisha speaks out.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil turns up the heat on the fireman who slept with his teenage nanny, and delves deeper into the affair that shattered the lives of a husband and wife, and her best friend and parents. Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Valentine's Day! Dr. Phil tackles romance dilemmas. Can't cook, don't know how to dress sexily, never buy the right gift, or have problems getting your groove on in the love department? Dr. Phil has solutions!Plus learn what men really want!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: It's a tale of torture that shocked America and Dr. Phil speaks exclusively to one woman who lived to tell it. The first of three women abducted by Ariel Castro, Michelle Knight, recounts her story inside Cleveland’s now notorious House of Horrors. Part 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Pat & Gheorghe say ex-Marine son Rich battles drugs & alcohol despite rehabs & sober houses the past 16 years. It's been 3 years since the family has seen Rich--don't miss an emotional reunion. Plus, hear what Rich admits happened the night before taping.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Mom, Vicki, has been married to Marissa's dad, Robert, for 34 years. Marissa discovered her dad was having an "affair" and visiting "porn" and "call girl" websites. Robert, a former pastor, admits a relationship, but insists he's a victim.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil examines the case of missing mother of two, Susan Powell. Her husband, Josh Powell, is now a person of interest, and Susan's parents, Charles and Judy Cox, are looking for answers. Go behind the headlines of this heartbreaking story.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil unfolds an incredible story of Loretta,brutally raped at age 15, Dean, the man accused, the power of DNA, innocence, exoneration, and forgiveness. Pt.1

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When the Clampetts decide they want to go home for Possum Day, Mr. Drysdale attempts to put together a Possum Day in Beverly Hills.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro thinks the Drysdale's young attractive maid is interested in him. He commences to courting her but she is actually interested in watching the football game on the Clampett's color TV.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts (thereafter Mr. Drysdale) mistake the new neighbor's maidservant for the actual owner. Granny tries her best to set Jed up with her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny's concocts a love potion for Elly Mae at the same time Mr. Drysdale hires an escort for Elly. Dean arrives at the mansion with the Clampetts believing he's Miss Jane's boyfriend so Granny tries a reverse spell.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts (thereafter Mr. Drysdale) mistake the new neighbor's maidservant for the actual owner. Granny tries her best to set Jed up with her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Lucas Sebastian, a billionaire entrepreneur, wants Jed to invest in his new venture, undersea farming.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Farquar, Mrs. Drysdale's father comes for a visit. When he's alone with Drysdale, he reveals he's broke. It seems on his way over, he passed through Las Vegas and lost his whole fortune and is asking Drysdale for a handout, which he refuses.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Daddy Farquhar continues to visit the Clampetts' mansion to his daughter Margaret's displeasure. He has plans for Granny and her money in Las Vegas but she's expecting a marriage proposal.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro wants to be a general and Mr. Drysdale decides the safest idea is to get him into a boys military academy. With Jethro twice the size of the other boys, the commander has his doubts while a mock battle confuses Granny and Jed.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When Mr. Drysdale is unhappy with Dr. Clyburn's treatment of his cold the Clampetts hear about it. Granny decides it's time to set up practice and enlists the rest of her family to help. She also claims a cure for the common cold.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The world's richest woman wants to buy the Clampett mansion and will stop at nothing to get it. Will Jed finally sell?

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny wants to learn to drive the truck but can't get used to modern day contraptions. A horse is more of what she wants and Mr. Drysdale gets her one, a professional race horse.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When Granny hears the Drysdales are at a horse show, she declares she wants good trotter so she can ride it to the market. When Mr. Drysdale buys a racer along with a buggy, Granny decides she wants to be the driver at the track.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny encounters an ostrich at the Drysdales and believe it's a giant chicken. She decides it got into her "medicinal tonic" and that's why it's so big. She tries to apply the idea to her vegetables.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts believe resuming his courtship of Elly is why Sonny Drysdale returns. His stepfather arranges a job as a beauty product salesman and his sixth stop at the Clampetts is where his merchandise is mistaken as courting gifts.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny, along with Elly, is heading back to the hills to do some doctoring. Mr. Drysdale is frantic to stop her so he reveals that the Brewsters are having a baby. Jethro brings home some girls from the Kit Kat Club so he won't be lonely.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: A shady magician sells his wares to the gullible Jethro.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed thinks Granny needs help in cleaning the mansion, but she believes it's because he wants to put her in a retirement home, so Granny is ready to head to the hills with her money, which Mr. Drysdale is desperate to avoid.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro is bent on becoming an astronaut but gets sidetracked into teaming up with Miss Jane to become a folk singer. Along the way, Jethro invents a new musical device he dubs the Bodine o' phone.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Drysdale, at first irate that beautiful actress Bergstrom is kept on an expensive stipend without making a film, is smitten at first sight and so places the actress in the Clampett home to learn backwoods accents and ways for a movie.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro becomes a Hugh Hefner wannabe when he discovers some Playpen magazines in Mr. Drysdale's garage.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny remains eager to get Elly to the altar and decides Professor Biddle, Miss Jane's friend, will do. Mr. Drysdale blackmails Dash into asking the Clampett lass for a date. The meek birdwatcher and the handsome actor are soon at odds.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny brews a batch of her tonic hoping it helps Elly get a husband. Jane and Mr. Biddle are trying to hatch a condor egg but a sip of the potion changes the birdwatcher's focus and the Clampetts need to get him out of a tree.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny receives a box from Cousin Pearl in the hills. One of the items in the box is an old-fashioned crank telephone. Granny asks Jethro to hook it up to a party line on the pole, so she can listen in on the party line

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny despairs of Elly Mae ever finding a husband and decides to promote her non-existent cooking skills. She is entered into a TV show cook-off, but nothing she fixes is edible.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: A con artist pretends to be someone from back home and stays with the Clampetts. She plans to get photos of Jed in a compromising position in order to blackmail him.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro decides to sophisticate Emaline, but she has bigger plans for blackmailing Mr. Drysdale with her cuckoo clock camera. The colonel continues to woo Granny. The two swindlers though haven't met someone as sharp as Jed.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S01E004) Brandon is visited by his ex-girlfriend Sheryl but, when she meets Dylan, she's quickly star-struck by his money and glamor.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S01E005) When Brandon tries out for the basketball team, he's angered to learn that his main rival is from another district.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S01E006) An unreasonable teacher makes Brandon's life miserable by giving him no grade higher than a C.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S01E007) "Delusions of glamour" overcome Brenda when she meets Kelly's beautiful mother Jackie, a former model.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S01E008) The Walsh parents examine their relationship while Brenda and Brandon examine theirs, as they get involved in a UCLA study on twins.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S01E009) Sympathy and responsibility are at odds when Brenda volunteers for a teen crisis hotline.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S01E010) The chemistry between Brenda and Dylan starts to heat up when Brenda accidentally catches him in the shower, then comforts him after he fights with his father.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S01E011) Both Walsh twins face the temptation to drink alcohol when their peers are doing it all around them.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S01E012) Brandon gets an unexpected taste of fatherhood when he asks his classmate Melissa for a date-then has to baby-sit her infant son while she has a college interview.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S01E013) Pillow talk threatens to destroy Brenda's sleep-over as all the girls share their deepest secrets, with unexpected results.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S01E014) The Walsh's agree to let their maid's niece, Carla, use their address to enroll at West Beverly.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S01E015) A weekend in Palm Springs goes awry when David invites Steve, Kelly and Donna to join him at his grandparents' house while they're away on a cruise-but he gets the dates confused, and they're still there.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S01E016) Brandon is "discovered" when he's out roller-blading, landing a role as an emergency extra on a big TV show.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S01E017) Brenda's had it with home life and West Beverly and decides to leave both for the real world.

When Mary reluctantly agrees to partner with Sandra in the pillow-making business, she finds herself doing all the work--with Sandra reaping all the 'benefits.'

Lester turns into a real pain for Mary when he comes home from work early complaining of a stomach ache, but when she sneaks out for a pedicure, Lester is stricken with appendicitis--leaving Sandra to care for him.

Alarmed that her biological clock is winding down, Sandra sets out to find a perfect husband to father her child, but when she strikes out with the available men, she decides to have a baby anyway--regardless of her marital status.
Anxious to become an adult, Brenda (Regina King) takes on part-time work, but soon discovers learning how to juggle all her responsibilities is a full-time job.

Brenda attempts to ensnare a boy's affection by inviting him to her Saturday night party, and following Sandra's sneaky suggestion, she tells him the party's on Friday night--but the scheme backfires when her parents go out for the evening.

Mary flies out to California to take a spin on the popular game show 'Wheel of Fortune,' but is shocked to discover a smug Sandra as her opponent--much to the dismay of hosts Pat Sajak and Vanna White.

Sandra's efforts to win the attention of a famous congressman (Robert Hooks) become muddled when Brenda's art teacher (Jayne Kennedy) catches his eye--yet in her pursuit she falls for another famous personality: Billy Dee Williams.

When Mary (Marla Gibbs) accepts the 'glamorous' title of Chairwoman of the Church benefit variety show, she soon realizes it's really a dirty job and prays for a group like the 'Temptations' to save the show.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Por orden del Gobernador de Virginia, un escéptico Gibbs se ve obligado a reunirse con un asesino en serie al que ayudó a condenar una década antes bajo el pretexto de que el asesino le dirá a Gibbs dónde escondió cadáveres desaparecidos.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs y el equipo son llamados cuando un hombre recientemente fallecido es encontrado encerrado en una tumba de la época de la Guerra Civil. El cadáver es el de un sargento desaparecido que, según Ducky, fue enterrado vivo.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): El bien común
programme.desc: El mundo de Danny se sacude cuando Robert Lewis (Michael Imperioli), de la oficina del Fiscal General, obtiene nuevas pruebas en su contra en el caso de tiroteo en defensa propia del asesino en serie Thomas Wilder.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): El precio de la justicia
programme.desc: Danny y Báez están decididos a conseguir justicia para una joven traumatizada que fue rehén, a pesar de su resistencia a presentar cargos.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Las regals de la mafia
programme.desc: Decididos a hacer justicia por el ataque a Gormley, Danny y Frank buscan la ayuda del detective Anthony Abetemarco, quien tiene vínculos con el barrio donde ocurrió el ataque.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Buen policía, mal policía
programme.desc: Danny y Baez investigan el asesinato de una anciana por una bala perdida. Mientras, Frank es ridiculizado por disciplinar a un policía irrespetuoso y Erin ayuda a su detective Anthony.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC busca un móvil y un sospechoso cuando las víctimas se encuentran en los inodoros de las paradas de camiones a lo largo de las carreteras en todo el sur.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando una chica de 18 años escapa de una casa suburbana donde estuvo cautiva por años con otras dos mujeres, el UAC busca al sospechoso que las secuestró.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC lleva a cabo una búsqueda en Los Ángeles después de que el equipo descubre imágenes de seguridad que muestran a un sospechoso siendo invitado a las casas de las víctimas.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando Morgan es secuestrado, la UAC se apresura a buscarlo y salvarle la vida.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS investiga y se ocupa de la muerte de Kate, Gibbs se emplea en poner fin al reinado de Ari en sus terroríficos montajes. Ziva David (Cote de Pablo), entrará como nuevo agente y compañero del equipo de investigación criminal.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS investiga y se ocupa de la muerte de Kate, Gibbs se emplea en poner fin al reinado de Ari en sus terroríficos montajes. Ziva David (Cote de Pablo), entrará como nuevo agente y compañero del equipo de investigación criminal.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Por orden del Gobernador de Virginia, un escéptico Gibbs se ve obligado a reunirse con un asesino en serie al que ayudó a condenar una década antes bajo el pretexto de que el asesino le dirá a Gibbs dónde escondió cadáveres desaparecidos.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies are led on a chase by a driver they pursued just weeks earlier, and a man caught with drugs tries to pin the blame on his girlfriend.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers review dashcam footage after a suspect claims force was used against him unjustly, and a weed enthusiast drops some knowledge on police about the founding fathers.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A woman leads police on a dangerous chase, a driver is remorseful for the damage he's caused, and a man's denial of solicitation is undermined by his open fly.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man loses his friend and finds trouble, officers stop a vehicle they believe was involved in a shooting, and a suspicious vehicle leads to a suspicious story.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man's mole gives him away when he tries to fool police with a fake name, a drunken man shows officers he has nothing to hide, and a reckless driver imperils a neighborhood.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Numerous patrol cars give chase to a man on a dirt bike refusing to yield, and an alleged armed robber is upfront about his reasons for running from police when approached.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man blames the weed found in his car on his absent nephew, a suspect in custody starts to convulse, and police respond to a call about an armed man tripping on bath salts.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man on a dirt bike tries to elude police while dumping his firearm, and after breaking up a parking lot drug deal, an officer advises a young suspect to make better choices.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: After chasing down a suspect on foot, officers retrieve a fully loaded revolver from his pants, and police respond to a call about a man wielding a knife outside a bar.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A fleeing motorcyclist tries to outsmart officers by hiding his bike in a retail garden area, and a concerned citizen reports seeing a man steal a package from a porch.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A jaywalking citation escalates to resisting arrest, an SUV contains more needles than one officer is willing to deal with, and a lovers' spat draws the attention of a patrol.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man refusing to drop his knife tests an officer's patience, neighbors hold an alleged thief until police arrive, and a couple of volatile newlyweds need police intervention.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers spot a suspect running down the street with a knife, the driver of a stolen car takes off on foot after he's pulled over, and police find carjacked vehicles.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man resisting arrest draws a crowd, an armed robbery suspect takes a walk down felony lane with an officer he recognizes, and a strange scene unfolds at a DUI checkpoint.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A prostitution sting in Las Vegas nets more than just johns, police respond to reports of a woman licking the sidewalk, and a patrol happens on a lovers' row in a parking lot.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A motorcyclist fleeing police slams into a pickup truck at high speed, and a man being frisked invents an interesting story to explain the suspicious bulge in his pants.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A fleet-footed deputy nabs a suspect on the run, officers responding to a domestic call are refused entry, and police try to ascertain the cause of a woman's hallucinations.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An intoxicated man suspected of domestic abuse refuses to obey deputies' orders, police find drugs in a woman's car, and an alleged prostitute encounters the police.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A traffic stop escalates to a dangerous situation, a woman admits to hitting her dad in the face with her teeth, and a defiant driver doesn't want deputies to search his car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers try to calm an agitated and disoriented man before he hurts himself or someone else, and a driver going 2 MPH on a highway catches the attention of a patrol car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Cops pursue a man skipping bail, an impaired driver is surprisingly cooperative, and officers struggle to remove a violent offender from a crime scene.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man learns a hard lesson about wearing his seatbelt, and police perform a traffic stop and uncover a sad man with a strange story.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A desperate trespasser attempts to give the cops the slip, and a frightened man tries to get the attention of deputies but takes the wrong approach.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A high-speed pursuit ends abruptly when the suspect makes a wrong turn, and a nervous man attempts to hide his crime when he thinks no one can see him.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A lawbreaker tries to convince the cops that he's a good guy, and deputies smell trouble during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A jumpy bicyclist mistakenly reveals more than he had planned, and officers search a darkened building in an attempt to thwart a robbery in progress.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A distressed woman leads the cops to her abusive fiance, and a couple of officers are suspicious when they pull over an overly friendly man.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and crew are called in after high roller Tony Braun, a known drug addict, is found dead in his house by a gardener.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The entire CSI team investigates a disappearance at a local university.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom investigates a possible suicide at a high-profile construction site.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When the class clown at the local high school is found murdered, the CSI team is called to investigate.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Sara and Warrick are called in to investigate an abandoned, blood-splattered apartment and Nick and Catherine must examine a dead scuba diver lodged in a tree.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team investigate a murder suspect who is caught red-handed, burying the victims, while Catherine and Warrick take on the case of a woman found dead in a hotel spa.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and Nick investigate the death of a book restorer, while Catherine and Sara are called to the scene of a fatal train crash.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and Catherine investigate the apparent violent death of a woman found in a sandbox. Their investigation leads them to the underground world of s and m clubs.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team investigate a casino heist during which innocent victims were shot, while Catherine and Sara are called to the scene of a murder in a remote part of the desert.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Warrick is in charge for the first time as the team investigates the murder of the con artist, who has run off with some tourists' money only to get shot and killed in the parking lot. The prime suspect in the case turns out to be Captain Brass' daughter.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team is called in when a famous real estate entrepreneur is found dead in a hotel elevator.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and Sara are called to the crime scene when two murder victims are found hidden in pipes at a construction site in the middle of an alfalfa field, while Catherine and Nick investigate an ostensible hunting accident.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom's nemesis, serial killer Paul Millander, reappears and claims a third victim in this gripping episode.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine is ordered by a kidnapper to accompany a man who is to deliver $1 million in ransom to him or else he will kill the man's mistress.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: En una elegante recaudación de fondos, a la que asiste el sheriff, una mujer aparece muerta en la piscina.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una mujer es secuestrada en el aparcamiento de un centro comercial. Es violada, golpeada, disparada y dada por muerta. Sara recoge pruebas de ella y se encariña con ella.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Encuentran un cadáver en una tienda de cerámica en lo que parece ser un robo interrumpido.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una pareja que sale de un restaurante en su aniversario es asesinada en la calle y su coche es robado. La escena del crimen se ve comprometida cuando llueve poco después de que lleguen los CSI.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Todo el equipo investiga el secuestro del hijo pequeño de una familia acomodada. Las sospechas recaen inmediatamente sobre los padres del niño.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Dos adolescentes atropellan con su coche a un sordo, pero no lo matan: ya estaba muerto.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Nick y Warrick toman el caso de un corredor que fue asesinado por un animal salvaje en el parque. La cosa se complica cuando descubren que al corredor le extirparon el hígado después de matarlo.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El día que Grissom tiene que evaluar a su equipo, se encuentra una cabeza en el maletero de un coche. Mientras Gil y Catherine trabajan en la cabeza, Sara y Nick investigan un cadáver en el desierto al que le falta la cabeza.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo investiga los continuos asesinatos cometidos por un asesino de firma. El asesino tiene ciertos conocimientos forenses y ha dejado pocas pruebas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo son llamados después de que Tony Braun, un conocido drogadicto, es encontrado muerto en su casa por un jardinero.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Todo el equipo de CSI investiga una desaparición en una universidad local.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom investiga un posible suicidio en una obra de gran envergadura.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando el payaso de la clase del instituto local aparece asesinado, se llama al equipo de CSI para que investigue.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Sara y Warrick son llamados para investigar un apartamento abandonado salpicado de sangre y Nick y Catherine deben examinar a un submarinista muerto alojado en un árbol.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio Caine and the CSI team unravel a complicated workplace murder mystery when a hated receptionist is found murdered in beautiful Miami.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When Horatio Caine's son Kyle returns from the war, he seeks the help of his father and the CSI team to solve a disturbing murder.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Spring Break raises the body count in Miami when Horatio Caine and the CSI team splits up to solve three different murders.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A victim's spirit won't leave Calleigh alone until she finds justice for his murder. She must enlist the help of Horatio and the rest of the CSI team.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A seemingly perfect jewelry heist ends in murder and when crime scene evidence is stolen from the lab, and Delko returns to find the culprit.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a suburban soccer mom is murdered, the CSIs uncover her family's dark past, while Delko continues his undercover mission.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When Horatio Caine's ex-girlfriend is killed in an explosion, the team looks within their own department to find the killer.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A serial killer taunts the CSIs by leaving them cryptic hints, and the longer it takes them to decode these puzzles, the higher the death toll rises.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSI team suffers the tragic loss of one of their own when a psychotic genius runs wild in otherwise beautiful Miami.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a bottle girl is murdered at an exclusive club, Horatio must search through Miami's most elite guest list to find her killer.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A young girl is kidnapped and the CSIs' only witness is a blind man, who heard the abduction, leading Horatio to an old nemesis.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When the killer of Horatio's wife busts out of prison and goes on a rampage, they must determine what he's after and find him before he strikes again.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a reality star is murdered, the CSIs investigate the cast, the obsessed fans, and the stars' hidden pasts to find the killer.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a man claims to have dreamed of a murder before it happened, Horatio must send Natalia undercover for the team to determine the truth.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un robo de auto aparentemente al azar resulta ser lo contrario cuando la adicción al juego de una mujer joven se vuelve más de lo que la empresa familiar puede soportar.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: La investigación de un tiroteo en la sala de emergencias de un hospital coloca al equipo de CSI en medio de un caso de asesinato que involucra al líder de una pandilla callejera importante.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Una parada de tránsito de rutina termina con el asesinato de un patrullero. El equipo de CSI debe resolver la obsesiva historia de amor de una joven para encontrar al asesino.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Una fiesta de fricción en una suite privada de uno de los hoteles de la ciudad que alberga a cientos de pasajeros de cruceros deja a una joven muerta.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio se enfrenta a un antiguo archienemigo que ya se le escapó una vez, un caso de robo de identidad conduce al asesinato, la pregunta es: ¿quién lo hizo?.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Los Everglades de Florida infestados de caimanes y serpientes se convierten en la zona cero de una serie de asesinatos inconexos, justo cuando los incendios arrasan el raro ecosistema.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando un pequeño avión choca contra un vecindario residencial, los restos revelan un cadáver en la bodega de carga, junto con medio millón de dólares en efectivo.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El mundo de los videos extremos de patinetas se vuelve mortal cuando la competencia se acalora dentro del estudio. Horatio y el equipo de CSI investigan.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: La temporada de impuestos comienza con todo cuando dos agentes de Hacienda aparecen muertos. Llaman a Horatio Caine y al equipo de CSI para investigar.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El club nocturno más sexy de South Beach en Miami se convierte en un hervidero de venganza cuando un asesinato cierra las puertas de un servicio de citas único.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Una niña de ocho años se convierte en el peón inocente de un juego feo y abusivo que termina en asesinato. Horatio y el equipo de CSI investigan.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un reencuentro de la escuela secundaria se vuelve mortal cuando un compañero de clase se deja llevar por un resentimiento de 15 años, Horatio y Yelina descubren que Ray aún puede estar vivo.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI trabaja contrarreloj para encontrar al supuesto cómplice en un caso de asesinato con hacha de hace años antes de que se ejecute al asesino convicto.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI corre contra el tiempo para localizar y desactivar una bomba radiactiva que estallará en medio del centro de Miami.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When the CSIs track down a suave and charming hitman, their investigation uncovers a conspiracy with far-reaching implications.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a serial rapist is murdered, restrained in the same manner as his victims, the CSIs weigh a feeling of justice against their sense of duty.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a conspiracy-obsessed woman is found dead, the CSIs investigate and discover that some of her theories may have had some truth to them.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a popular student at Manhattan's most elite private school is murdered, the CSIs find themselves in the competitive world of the overprivileged.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Jo balances personal and professional challenges when her adopted daughter, Ellie, is the key witness in a murder investigation.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The team enters the competitive world of gourmet food trucks when one explodes at a SoHo food festival while Hawkes is there with his girlfriend.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate a woman's death as the work of a serial killer. Mac reconnects with his first partner after an ex-con begins stalking him.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: After a hail of gunfire tears through the crime lab, Mac and his ex-partner become part of a vendetta 17 years in the making.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Following a near-death experience, Detective Mac Taylor becomes quite determined to close his last remaining unsolved case.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: On the 10th anniversary of 9/11, Mac and the team remember specific moments from that day that were indelibly burned in their mind.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When an awkward teen is found dead, the team discovers that his efforts to win a sexy punk rock chick’s heart may have gone a step too far.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When the body of a beautiful young woman is found in a stolen Ferrari, the investigation leads to a family of car thieves.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A night out for a friendly drink takes a very unexpected turn when Danny and his rookie cops are caught up in a shooting.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI New York team investigates when the recently paroled brother of a young basketball prodigy is implicated in a murder.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Un caballero de brillante armadura empalado con una lanza en Central Park y un empresario apuñalado con un picahielos en un hotel cercano comparten una conexión.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Anulan la sentencia contra un asesino en serie cuando Mac encarcela al oficial que lo arrestó, pero aparece una víctima con la firma del asesino.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Stella se ve obligada a enfrentar recuerdos dolorosos cuando el detective Valens la visita y le dice que su ADN está conectado a un caso sin resolver de Filadelfia, lo que la convierte en sospechosa.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI queda desconcertado cuando las pruebas y los testigos señalan a John McEnroe como su sospechoso de asesinato a pesar de su coartada irrefutable.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Mac, Stella y Hawkes se ven obligados a salvar el laboratorio cuando un capo de la droga y su pandilla bajan a la bóveda del equipo de CSI para recuperar su mercancía.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Un asesinato en la estatua de la libertad sacude a la ciudad de Nueva York mientras el equipo de CSI intenta atrapar al asesino antes de que vuelva a atacar.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga la muerte de un buceador profesional vinculado a un rumor de tesoro hundido en el puerto de Nueva York.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga un asesinato relacionado con una serie de robos de espías dirigidos a la élite mientras Mac sigue recibiendo misteriosas llamadas telefónicas.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI con sede en Nueva York investiga el extraño asesinato de un científico, así como la rara muerte de una universitaria.

programme.title: CSI: New York

programme.title: CSI: New York

programme.title: Caso Cerrado

programme.title: Caso Cerrado

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Rafael perdió una pierna defendiendo a su suegra Sonia, ella le compró una prótesis y ahora se la quita. Juan es torero y le enseña a sus hijos esta peligrosa profesión, su esposa se opone.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Yahima quiere que su hija abandone la casa porque es una adicta a inhalar chocolate como droga. Por otro lado, la hija de Natalia es autista y en una fiesta tiró al suelo al bebé de Elena.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado

programme.title: Caso Cerrado

programme.title: Caso Cerrado

programme.title: Halloween: 20 años después
programme.desc: Hace 20 años, el mal escapó bajo la forma de Michael Myers, lo cual llevó a una sangrienta matanza en Halloween. Ahora, Michael ha vuelto para aterrorizar a una nueva generación, comenzando por la sobreviviente Laurie Strode (Jamie Lee Curtis).

programme.title: Halloween VIII: Resurrección
programme.desc: Un grupo de universitarios gana un concurso para pasar la noche en el hogar de la infancia del brutal asesino serial Michael Myers. Esperan asustarse un poco, pero no están preparados para lo que los espera en la aterradora secuela de HALLOWEEN H20.

programme.title: Halloween VI: La maldición de Michael Myers
programme.desc: El pueblo de Haddonfield, Illinois, celebra Halloween por primera vez en cinco años, pero el asesino en masa maníaco Michael Myers se une a las festividades, con su némesis, el Dr. Loomis, un empedernido psiquiatra, pisándole los talones.

programme.title: Envidia
programme.desc: Un hombre empieza a sentir cada vez más celos del nuevo éxito de su amigo.

programme.title: Quemando ruedas
programme.desc: El lisonjero vendedor Don Ready (Jeremy Piven) y su alocado equipo de cerradores tienen un fin de semana para vender más de 200 autos y demostrar que cuando se trata de estafar, conspirar y de usar todo tipo de artimañas, ¡ellos tienen lo necesario!

programme.title: Five Guns To Tombstone
programme.desc: A reformed outlaw is living a clean life until his no-good brother who just escaped from prison ropes him into pulling a robbery. Now Billy has his own plan...to prevent it. And all he needs is his six shooters and a little luck.

programme.title: The Alamo
programme.desc: John Wayne produces, directs and stars in this retelling of the Alamo, a battle in which 185 men joined together against an army of 7,000. Filmed entirely in Texas, "The Alamo" is a visually stunning and historically accurate celebration of courage.

programme.title: Rio Lobo
programme.desc: This fifth and final collaboration between John Wayne and director Howard Hawks is an action-filled Western set after the Civil War, in which a group of men seek out Union traitors responsible for a string of train robbers.

programme.title: Hondo
programme.desc: John Wayne plays Hondo Lane, a cavalry rider who becomes the protector of Angie Lowe as well as a father figure to her boy, Johnny. Angie, determinedly awaiting the return of her husband, refuses to leave their homestead despite the growing danger.

programme.title: Johnny Guitar
programme.desc: Gambling house operator Vienna seeks control of a town as archrival Emma Small sets out to force Vienna out of town. The timely arrival of Johnny Guitar thwarts Emma's dark plans, but doesn't prevent a showdown between the women.

programme.title: Rio Grande
programme.desc: Lt. Col. Yorke leads his cavalry troops to the Rio Grande to fight a warring tribe. Yorke’s toughest battle lies ahead when his unorthodox plan to outwit the elusive Apaches leads to possible court-martial.

programme.title: Vera Cruz
programme.desc: In this epic Western, two shady mercenaries (Gary Cooper, Burt Lancaster) in Mexico during the 1866 revolution are hired to escort a Countess and her gold to the Mexican army in Vera Cruz and find themselves at odds with the army…and each other!

programme.title: Roman Holiday
programme.desc: Audrey Hepburn's portrayal of a modern-day princess, rebelling against the royal obligations, who explores Rome on her own. This romantic comedy ranks as one of the most enjoyable films of all times.

programme.title: Sabrina
programme.desc: Bogie and Holden are the mega-rich Larrabee brothers of Long Island. Bogie’s all work, Holden’s all playboy. But when Sabrina (Hepburn), daughter of the family’s chauffeur, returns from Paris, the stage is set for some family fireworks.

programme.title: Paris When It Sizzles
programme.desc: Richard Quine directs George Axelrod's acerbic script (adapted from Julien Duvivier's La Fête à Henriette) in this romantic comedy that reunites William Holden and Audrey Hepburn for the first time since 1954's Sabrina.

programme.title: Paris Blues
programme.desc: Ram (Paul Newman) and Eddie (Sidney Poitier) are two expatriate jazz musicians living in Paris, where their music is celebrated. When they fall in love with two vacationing American girls, they must decide if they should move back to America with them.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Two divorced men decide to share a New York apartment. Fussy Felix, fastidious to a fault. He proves that cleanliness is next to insanity. And Oscar, who wreaks havoc on a tidy room with the speed and thoroughness of a tornado.

programme.title: The Apartment
programme.desc: Jack Lemmon, Shirley MacLaine and Fred MacMurray are superb in this tale of love and ambition in the world of big business that went on to garner a Best Picture Oscar.

programme.title: Irma La Douce
programme.desc: Set in Paris' famous Red Light district, a rookie policeman (Jack Lemmon) plots to keep a beautiful prostitute (Shirley MacLaine) all to himself in this hit comedy from director Billy Wilder.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Using the German propaganda radio network,Hogan gets information to the underground.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Oscar Madison falls in love with a beautiful woman who has two children he adores and before he knows it, he's engaged to be married and Felix prepares to lose a roommate.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Felix has a big commission riding on a new diet pill promotion but the model, "the fattest man in the world," suddenly decides he won't take the job. So Felix convinces Oscar Madison to put on a "fat suit" and pose in the "before" photograph.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: When Oscar Madison finds a friend with inside information on his favorite sport, horse racing, he begins to win every bet.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Felix Unger is irate when given notice of another rent increase and organizes the entire building to go on strike until certain repairs and improvements are made to either justify the increase or cancel it altogether.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: The Shady Rest hotel is threatened when a railroad detective comes to investigate a forgotten spur line on the property.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Kate uses her charms to keep Homer Bedloe from catching the train to Pixley.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: President of the railroad comes to visit the Shady Rest hotel with the intention to terminate the Cannonball's service.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer is accused by a drunk's wife of turning her husband into an alcoholic.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Carter sends Gomer to a psychiatrist when he claims he has seen men from outer space.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: The location of a chemical plant is the prize when Hogan gets Carter to become a traitor.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: A Gestapo officer who knows all about the Stalag 13 operation blackmails Hogan to find out about the Manhattan Project.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Klink's illness causes problems for one of Hogan's plots.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: The Allied Command orders Colonel Hogan to leave and turn over his operations to the bumbling Colonel Crittendon.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Newkirk sneaks a beautiful woman into camp who turns out to be a Gestapo agent.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Mr. Haney is up to his money-making schemes again. When a government representative tells Mr. Haney that the state is looking to purchase the Douglas farm for a new highway, Mr. Haney arranges to buy back the farm from the Douglases at a steal.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Ralph, the lady carpenter, runs away from home and stays with the Douglases after having a fight with her brother, Alf. While Oliver may never get his bedroom finished, he gains a maid as Ralph takes over as the Douglases' live-in housekeeper.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Bubba gets involved when his cousin Candace and her husband Kevin are being blackmailed by Waylon Davis, the birth father of their adopted baby. Davis threatens to contest the adoption unless they cooperate, but will they give in to his demands?

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Jeanette Marshall is a teacher in Sparta who has eye for the gentlemen, but her multiple romances attract negative attention from the townsfolk, and eccentric Ashe Crowe makes it his mission to put a permanent stop to Jeanette's flirtatious ways.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: The fun and games come to a halt when Edgar Van Buren, the wealthy host of an annual high-stakes poker party, is murdered. Gillespie and Tibbs must sift through the evidence of a case where everyone is a suspect, including the dead man’s wife.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Bubba finds himself in trouble when he is in involved in an accidental shooting while on the job. The only witness is Virgil's Aunt Ruda, whose grudge against Virgil may work against exonerating Bubba. Can anyone convince her to do what is right?

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Bubba Skinner returns to Los Angeles to tie up some unfinished business on an arson case in Sparta that’s connected to the mob in L.A. He reunites with Mike Chin, the star witness against the mob, and sparks fly once again between Bubba and Pat Day.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Cyrus Chambers and Tom Dalton are business partners in town, but when Cyrus decides he wants out of the partnership the trouble starts. Money and a secret love affair drive Tom to stop at nothing to bring Cyrus down, not even murder.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Wilson Sweet is curious about the murder of his grandfather over forty years ago and finds the incident may not have happened like he was told. An old bluesman in town has written a song about the murder and brings light to what really happened.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: For Bubba Skinner and his date Mary Ellen, a picnic ends in gunshots and the discovery of a large marijuana operation. When the wrong bullet slug is found on the ballistics report, Gillespie and Tibbs suspect that a Sheriff’s Deputy may be involved.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: District Attorney Gerard Darnelle is tough on criminals and has made many enemies throughout his long career. When his daughter is kidnapped, the FBI arrives, but Gillespie and Tibbs sidestep them and follow their own leads to bring her home safely.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: When Lonnie Jamison helps Francie Miller, an old high school crush who’s in deep trouble and hitting the bottle, he finds a connection between Francie’s low-life boyfriend, Nick Crews, and a recent armed robbery of a local Sparta supermarket.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: A greedy slumlord in the Bottoms, Keen Philbrick, is notorious for the cruel and unfair treatment of his tenants, and his ownership of two drug dens. When he’s found murdered, Gillespie will need the help of savvy Bottoms informant, Jimmy Dawes.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: The Sparta police look into the murder of a wealthy invalid whose philandering husband is having an affair with a local beautician. All the evidence points to the beautician as the prime suspect, but she soon finds her own life is in danger.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Jenny Sawyer, a victim of domestic abuse, is fearful of her husband, Wesley, but she constantly covers up for him and refuses help. When Wesley is murdered outside a local tavern, the police wonder if Jenny may have taken matters into her own hands.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Odessa Robbins is a civil rights hero in Sparta, and the town is planning a celebration of her life. Gillespie’s worries about old racial tensions resurfacing are sadly justified when the festivities are disrupted, putting Odessa’s life in danger.

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: McCall's ex-partner has gone bad. In an attempt to save him from putting himself behind bars by accepting a 'contract,' McCall and Hunter go after him and try to stop him.

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: After the Commissioner's wife is murdered, Hunter and McCall have to piece together the clues in order to find the true killer.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver's loyalties are put to the test when the KGB challenges him to steal a touring Chinese artifact in exchange for the release of a woman he once loved.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver heists an ancient Chinese artifact as a ransom for a woman he once loved, only to learn she's double-crossed him.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: When former mobster Jimmy "The Eraser's" new identity is exposed, MacGyver is forced into action to save Jimmy's daughter and grandson.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: While hiking through remote wilderness, MacGyver uncovers an elaborate scheme to siphon oil from a pipeline when he comes to the aid of a young girl, terrorized by the legendary Sasquatch.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver teams up with the sister of a murdered friend to expose a diamond heist operation that they suspect is the work of a diplomat, using his status to shield him from suspicion and arrest.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Steve becomes embroiled in political intrigue after the murder of a city councilman's wife appears to be part of a larger political strategy.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Mark investigates when her older lover, a new state Supreme Court Justice, murders a teenage girl.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A Malibu Hills fire is the backdrop for rising tensions between the residents; a disgraced stockbroker, a naturalist, a worried father, and a land developer. A worried Dr. Sloan deals with his own parental fears when Steve helps fight the fire.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Community General is already under increased security, with a high-profile criminal hospitalized, when an important businesswoman is brought in. Mark suspects her security guard has deadly intentions.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Jesse's new part-time job as a trainer of the pro basketball Mustangs turns deadly when he's accused of murdering a star player.

programme.title: Kung Fu
programme.desc: Kwai Chang Caine (David Carradine), the half-American Buddhist monk from China, wandering the American West as a wanted fugitive, befriends a boy without housing, foils a bounty hunter, and experiences the pain of love.

programme.title: Kung Fu
programme.desc: Kwai Chang Caine (David Carradine), a half-American Buddhist monk from China, restores the eyes and faith of a phony preacher (John Carradine), blinded by Indians, and finds his own roots in America.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Marcia battles nerves and Greg's sexist remarks when she tries to get her driver's license. Eventually, the debate over which gender has the better driving abilities leads to a winner-take-all driving test in a vacant parking lot.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Peter and Bobby believe they are seeing a UFO, which actually is part of an elaborate hoax being played by Greg. The trick backfires though when Peter and Bobby take pictures, which lead to a government investigation.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Cousin Oliver comes to live with the Bradys. He immediately causes a series of accidents, which lead him to believe that he is a jinx.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: After Mike gets a visit from an FBI agent and Sam comes to him with some secret plans, Bobby and Oliver believe that Sam is a spy.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: It's Edith and Archie Bunker's 22nd wedding anniversary and their daughter Gloria and her husband Mike are planning a surprise Sunday brunch. Edith is pleasantly surprised, however, Archie's 'no big deal' attitude leads to a huge argument.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Mike writes a letter to President Nixon protesting everything that's wrong with America, including the state of the environment and the nation's involvement in Vietnam. Archie finds out, and he decides he also will write a letter to Tricky Dick.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: While moonlighting, driving a taxi for Bert Munson, Archie is in a minor fender bender with a Jewish woman.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Roger, a friend of Mike and Gloria's, stops by. Archie takes one look and labels him as gay even though Mike insists that he isn't. Mike makes a realization that one of Archie's drinking buddies, Steve is a well-adjusted, straight-acting, gay man.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Mike is set to go down to the blood bank to donate some blood and asks Archie if he would like to donate.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Gloria comes home from the doctor with some news: she's pregnant. This leads to a big argument between Archie and Mike so Mike decides to quit school and move out. Archie doesn't believe him until Mike gets a job in Detroit and plans on moving there.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Just before leaving on a flight to Europe, Mike's hippie friends need a place to stay for the night. Mike invites them to stay in the Bunker's living room, however, Archie objects citing that no unmarried couple will spend the night under his roof.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie discovers that a new family is moving to the neighborhood. He goes over to investigate, only to discover that the new family is black. Archie quickly hopes to round the neighborhood up and try to force the family out of the area.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Edith is all excited that she has been chosen for jury duty. When Archie realizes that she may be sequestered, he forbids her to be on the jury, wanting to keep her at home to cook and clean for him. When she is sequestered, Archie fends for himself.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie stays up all night, expecting a phone call from a security guard who has information. It seems his company is laying off and he fears he may lose his job. No one else in the Bunker household can sleep either and it turns into a three ring circus.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Finances not only cause Vint and Naomi to separate but also force them to remain living at home with Mama. Mama, on the other hand, is so miserable that she has no alternative but to force them back together.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: After attending a big wedding, Bubba, Iola, and Mama each fantasize about what it would be like to be married and each realizes that, for now, that "heaven can wait!"

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: When the Tri-State fair comes to Raytown, Mama takes in weekend boarders in order to buy a new stove. All "bed" lam breaks loose when they overbook and the family winds up sleeping together in the same room.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Vint is so embarrassed when Mama brings his childhood lunchbox to work that he accidentally cuts his finger and takes it to his bed, refusing to go back to work.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: To get Aunt Effie to follow her doctor's advice to exercise, Mama persuades her to join a tap dance class at the Senior Citizens Center. Mama soon takes over the class, forming a troupe of blue-haired hoofers that becomes the toast of Raytown.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: When Mama's crazy old Uncle Oscar passes on, he leaves her his talking parrot, Captain Petey, who convinces the family that Mama was left a treasure worth more than $50,000, which is hidden somewhere in the house.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Al is reluctant to have Buck neutered despite being threatened with lawsuits from numerous neighbors regarding Buck's "nocturnal carnal activities.”

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: The Bundys take a vacation to near-beautiful Dumpwater, Florida and stay in a cut-rate motel where an ax murderer that hates tourists shows up every five years since 1967.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: After a hair-raising encounter with the maniac, Al decides to get the family out of town. But, they are trapped at the motel by a storm and the locals are unwilling to help them.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Steve takes Al to the vault at the bank where Steve works for a secret after-hours card game. The next day, one million dollars is reported missing.

programme.title: Married... With Children

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: While Al and Steve are occupied by a female employee who fixes the Bundy's refrigerator, Peggy invites Marcy to a strip club with the girls.

programme.title: Married... With Children

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1981, Cassie Hansen, de 6 años, desapareció de su iglesia de Minnesota durante una misa vespertina. Después de recibir un aviso de que se vio a un hombre mayor cargando a una persona pequeña, la policía encontró el cuerpo de Cassie en un basurero.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mujer joven es apuñalada más de 100 veces. El asesino deja atrás el ADN, pero los investigadores deben jugar al gato y al ratón para obtener el ADN de un sospechoso que coincida.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un estudiante de posgrado de la Universidad Estatal de Michigan desapareció y se presumió muerto. Con la ayuda de un profesor de ciencias geológicas, la policía esperaba obtener información de su asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un misterioso accidente informático llevó a una próspera empresa de fabricación al borde del colapso, poniendo en peligro cientos de puestos de trabajo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2003, el adolescente de St. Cloud, Jason MacLennan, regresó a su casa después de una noche con amigos y descubrió el cuerpo de su padre tirado en un charco de sangre.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La mejora digital del video de la cámara de seguridad muestra que lo que parece ser un encuentro casual es en realidad un secuestro forzado, que conduce al asesinato.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1971, John List dejó una nota con los cuerpos de su madre, esposa y tres hijos en el salón de baile de su mansión antes de desaparecer por completo. Los detectives deben resolver el caso, a pesar de tener solo una fotografía desactualizada de List.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2005, David Castor sufrió una muerte lenta y agonizante durante varios días. Su esposa Stacey sostuvo que fue un suicidio, a pesar de que se hizo con un anticongelante.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1993, Kathryn Bishop de 82 años es encontrada muerta en su hogar de Pennsylvania. Pequeñas pistas en el cuerpo de la víctima le dirán a la policía lo que pasó esa noche.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1997, se encontró el carro de Kelly Eckart, con todas sus pertenencias aún dentro del mismo, después de haber trabajado un turno nocturno en Franklin, Indiana. Días más tarde, se encontró su cuerpo en un barranco aislado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un vecino vio cómo un hombre apuñalaba a su esposa, la empujaba a la piscina y le metía la cabeza bajo el agua.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: El caso musical
programme.desc: En 1999, una niña de 12 años fue encontrada asesinada en su casa y cambió la sensación de seguridad que tenían los residentes de la pequeña ciudad de Waseca, Minnesota.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Camino fatal
programme.desc: Un patrullero de carreteras fue enviado a lo que pensó que sería un accidente de tráfico de rutina hasta que miró en el automóvil.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En la década de los 90, los medios llamaron a Richard Rogers el "asesino de la última llamada" porque atacaba a hombres en bares gay que obviamente estaban intoxicados.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: No había una razón clara para que un joven y saludable estudiante universitario estuviera muerto. Pero cuando el forense descubrió una pequeña pista durante la autopsia, los investigadores pudieron descubrir un misterio lleno de traición y venganza.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un niño de quince años muere a causa de una misteriosa herida de bala en la cabeza mientras está sentado en el vestíbulo del club de armas de su padre.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1986, Gary Dale Larson fue asesinado a puñaladas en su casa de Edmond, Oklahoma. El asesino agredió sexualmente a la novia de Larson, Janet Haynes.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: El mundo es un escenario
programme.desc: La policía es enviada a la escena de un tiroteo y descubren que el esposo de la víctima es uno de los suyos: un detective de homicidios que dice que su esposa se disparó accidentalmente en la cabeza.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En la búsqueda del asesino de dos adolescentes de Texas, un perfil de conducta llevó a sospechar de Jason Massey. La ciencia demostró que el perfil era correcto y Massey fue ejecutado mediante inyección letal el 3 de Abril del 2001.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Con un pie en el crimen
programme.desc: El cuerpo descompuesto de una mujer joven fue descubierto en un canal de irrigación de Bakersfield. Si había rastros de evidencia, se había lavado con el agua.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1996, Derrick Duehren regresó para encontrar su casa en Oregon hecha cenizas. Los restos calcinados de su esposa se encontraron luego en los escombros. Los investigadores intentaron determinar si fue un accidente desafortunado o un asesinato.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El fotógrafo profesional Charles Rathbun afirma que la modelo Linda Sobek murió durante un encuentro sexual consensuado que salió mal, pero el cadáver de Sobek y las imágenes digitales cuentan una historia más siniestra.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El cuerpo de Leanne Tiernan, de 16 años, fue descubierto nueve meses después de su desaparición. Los científicos forenses encontraron pistas que pintaron un retrato virtual de su asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Se denuncia la desaparición de una mujer tras una pelea con su marido. La policía sospecha de un hombre que denunció un incendio en su automóvil. En el interior se encuentran dos diminutas gotas de sangre.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La víctima había ingerido una gran cantidad de cianuro. Una pista muy improbable: una falla en el sobre de correo, expuso a un asesino que estaba dispuesto a matar a gente inocente.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La víctima había sido apuñalada más de treinta veces y la escena del crimen estaba inundada de sangre. Cerca de su cabeza, la policía descubrió un distintivo botón con hebras de hilo todavía unidas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Raspando la Superficie
programme.desc: Los científicos forenses trabajan con la única pista recuperada de un tiroteo con múltiples víctimas: una escopeta de calibre 12. Los científicos utilizan métodos únicos para extraer el número de serie del arma y rastrearlo hasta su propietario.

programme.title: Lost Cities of The Ancients

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Leland has to attend a Lamaze class before he can join the hunt--another Chapman is on the way! But when Dog starts to go after this accused jewelry thief without his fastest son, he learns that this fugitive puts the "R" in runner.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Dog discovers today's prey is a notorious ladies man, he knows just how to lure him in. The trap includes a suggestive phone call, a motel rendezvous, and a crew of bounty hunters waiting in the next room ready to break up the party!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today's fugitive is accused of assaulting a police officer, so Dog and the team are not taking any chances. So Dog has to play on his target's greed and deploy some modern technology to set a trap for this runner.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Baby Lyssa wakes up in a jail cell, but ignores the ensuing media frenzy in order to befriend a woman waging a personal battle against drug addiction.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A fugitive with a long criminal record has fled to Hawaii, and the bondsman on the mainland has asked Dog for help. Dog doesn't have much information to work with, but he can use the felon's desire to impress his friends to track him down.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: To his traditional bounty hunting tools of confidential informants, canvassing, and silver-tongued subterfuge, the world's greatest bounty hunter has added Facebook! A word to the wise for those on the run-post at your own peril, the Dog is watching!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog likes to say, "The apple doesn't fall far from the tree," and this is a hunt where that is true. So will Dog be able to use one family member's troubled ways to catch another one in trouble with the law?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: While the team tries to handle the bond that newcomer Alysin wrote incorrectly, sparks are flying between Beth and Duane Lee when he questions Beth's decision to go on the hunt without Dog leading the charge!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Two different young men both have a bad habit of missing their court dates. Looking over their files, Dog senses that they have another trait in common, both are a little too tied to their mothers.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's target today has a history of violence, and apparently plans to re-locate without notifying the proper authorities. Unfortunately the team is missing a key player, Duane Lee is MIA today, distracted by his new lady love.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and Duane Lee can't agree about what role Duane Lee should have in the family business. But the family comes together as they set out to hunt a chronic violator with an open warrant and a wife who has an odd request for Dog.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has dropped Duane Lee from the team. When Leland confronts Dog and Beth about the decision, tempers flare. But they have to come together to answer a cry for help from a mother who feels that the safest place for her daughter is jail.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Cecily has graduated from High School, and Dog believes the time is right to show her what the family business is all about. The rough and tumble world of bounty hunting is very different from the all-girls private school she attended.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: This one is close to home. Dog's target on today's hunt is the cousin of Kali, Garry Boy's caregiver. In addition, she has a reputation as a brawler. With Duane Lee still missing from the team, Baby Lyssa decides she will step up in this hunt.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: In an attempt to bring the team back together, Dog recruits his pastor, Tim Storey, to be the peacemaker. As Dog begins his hunt for a young man who has trouble showing up at court, Tim has his own mission--convince Duane Lee to meet with him.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With Duane Lee back on the team, the rift in the Chapman clan appears over. But will time heal this wound? As the family heads out for the seedier side of Honolulu in search of an erotic dancer, we will find out if the wound is truly healed.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When can a bounty hunt also be a date? When Dog and Beth decide to ride in the same SUV as they pursue a runaway fugitive, will their different approaches to the investigation lead to a capture and romance?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When an alleged abuser goes on, the lame Dog gathers the team to bring him in. As the leads grow colder, Dog's determination only grows stronger. Finally, a hot lead comes in and Dog sets the trap for his prey.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and company head to the Big Island in pursuit of two courthouse no-shows, only to find that one of them appears to be posting status updates from Southern California.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The cameras are turned around, as we get a tour of life "behind the scenes" on Dog the Bounty Hunter. Using interviews with Dog and the posse, the TV crew, and never before seen footage, this is one of most revealing and heartfelt episodes of the series.

programme.desc: Fallon gets a letter from Steven and it turns out he's on an oil rig in the Java Sea, Indonesia. Adam mixes the toxic compound in the paint for Jeff's new office. Fallon hires Kirby as a nanny for little Blake.

programme.desc: The bodies of several women are found on a remote hill in California. The police get a break when a prostitute escapes and is able to identify her attacker and his automobile.

programme.desc: While skeet shooting on a beautiful spring day, Martin Dillon is shot dead. His friend maintains it was a freak accident, but it takes more than 20 years for the truth to surface.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When four-month-old Ryan Stallings dies under suspicious circumstances, his mother is ultimately convicted of his murder. But months later, new evidence emerges from a startling source — his newborn brother.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Doctors are puzzled when a two-year-old boy is rushed to the hospital with brain seizures and breathing difficulties. Finally, the boy's sister provides an important clue, raising the possibility of a rare syndrome.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, police received a call from Darlie Routier telling them of her two sons' murders. The police found the killer by analyzing blood spatter, doing behavioral profiling and analyzing Darlie's 911 call.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On a windy Kansas night in 1995, a mysterious fire swept through the home of a prominent doctor. In the debris, investigators found evidence which told them how the fire started.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Sometime during a neighborhood Christmas party, five-year-old Melissa Brannen disappeared. Investigators turned to forensic science to help them see what the witnesses missed.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Who was the sexual offender who murdered two adolescent boys in Nebraska? The key to stopping him would be the unique composition of the "junk rope" he used to tie his victims.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Mark Fair left for work and his fiancée, Karla Brown, stayed home. Later, he found her dead. During the autopsy, bite marks on her body were re-examined and forensic odontology identified the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Janice Johnson was found dead at the foot of her basement stairs. Police in Nova Scotia had to unravel the circumstances surrounding Janice's death and answer the question: Was it an accident or murder?

programme.title: Forensic Files
